violations.issue: Calls to HAL_GPIO_WritePin and HAL_TIM_PWM_Start/Stop functions access shared hardware resources without any synchronization, risking race conditions in concurrent or interrupt-driven contexts.
violations.recommendation: Protect calls to HAL_GPIO_WritePin and HAL_TIM_PWM_Start/Stop with appropriate synchronization mechanisms such as disabling interrupts or using mutexes to ensure exclusive access to shared hardware resources.
